test.summary: 93 tests passing across 6 test files (59 shared + 34 API)

typecheck.summary: All 4 packages typecheck cleanly (shared, api, dashboard, scanner)

appliedUpdates.description: Added Prisma 7 quirks section to environment.md documenting removal of --skip-generate flag and use of --url flag for db push
Added JWT token generation section to architecture.md documenting the jti claim requirement to prevent duplicate tokens during concurrent generation

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the strict TDD mandate in backend-worker and infra-worker skills. For refactoring existing routes or infrastructure changes (dependency pinning, env guards), writing tests in parallel with or after implementation is often more effective than writing tests first. Consider changing the TDD requirement from 'must write tests first' to 'must have comprehensive test coverage, TDD encouraged but not mandatory for refactoring/infra tasks'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both httponly-cookie-auth (backend-worker) and security-debt-infra (infra-worker) workers deviated from strict TDD because it didn't fit their refactoring/infrastructure work patterns. Both delivered high-quality, well-tested code despite the deviation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that when a feature is found to already be implemented by a prior worker's commit, the assigned worker should verify the existing implementation and complete with a validation-only handoff rather than writing duplicate code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature dashboard-cookie-migration was assigned to worker f0331e30 but was already fully implemented in commit 69877d6 by the httponly-cookie-auth worker. The worker correctly identified this and performed verification instead of duplicate work.
